metadata.title: obsidian-custom-attachment-location
metadata.description: Customize attachment location with variables($filename, $data, etc) like typora.

regex.source: Notice("An unhandled error occurred. Please check the console for more information.")
regex.target: Notice("发生了一个未处理的错误。请检查控制台以获取更多信息。")

regex.source: Notice(`Attachment ${file.path} is still used by other notes. It will not be deleted.`)
regex.target: Notice(`附件 ${file.path} 仍被其他笔记使用。它将不会被删除。`)
name: "收集当前笔记中的附件"
name: "收集当前文件夹中的附件"
name: "收集整个保险库中的附件"
.setName("重命名具有已知名称的粘贴文件")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically replace whitespace in attachment folder and file name with hyphens.")
regex.target: .setDesc("自动将附件文件夹和文件名中的空格替换为连字符。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically set all characters in folder name and pasted image name to be lowercase.")
regex.target: .setDesc("自动将文件夹名称和粘贴图像名称中的所有字符设置为小写。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Paste images from clipboard converting them to JPEG.")
regex.target: .setDesc("从剪贴板粘贴图像并将其转换为 JPEG。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The smaller the quality, the greater the compression ratio.")
.setDesc("If enabled, empty attachment folders will be preserved, useful for source control purposes.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，将保留空附件文件夹，这对于源代码控制很有用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, when the note is deleted, its orphan attachments are deleted as well.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，当笔记被删除时，其孤立附件也将被删除。")

regex.source: .appendText("Do you want to collect attachments for all notes in folder: ")
regex.target: .appendText("您是否要收集文件夹中的所有笔记的附件：")

regex.source: .appendText(" to use relative path. Available variables: ")
regex.target: .appendText("开始使用相对路径。可用变量：")

regex.source: .appendText(" are not recommended, because Obsidian doesn't track them. You might need to use ")
regex.target: .appendText("不推荐，因为 Obsidian 不跟踪它们。您可能需要使用")

regex.source: .appendText("When renaming md files, automatically rename attachment folder if folder name contains ")
regex.target: .appendText("重命名 md 文件时，如果文件夹名称包含，则自动重命名附件文件夹")

regex.source: .appendText("When renaming md files, automatically rename attachment files if file name contains ")
regex.target: .appendText("重命名 md 文件时，如果文件名包含，则自动重命名附件文件")

regex.source: .appendText(" setting is enabled, images drag&dropped into the editor will be converted to JPEG.")
regex.target: .appendText("设置已启用，拖放到编辑器中的图像将被转换为 JPEG 格式。")

regex.source: .appendText("If enabled, only image files will be renamed.")
regex.target: .appendText("如果启用，仅图像文件将被重命名。")

regex.source: .appendText("If disabled, all attachment files will be renamed.")
regex.target: .appendText("如果禁用，所有附件文件将被重命名。")

regex.source: .appendText("If enabled, pasted copied files with known names will be renamed.")
regex.target: .appendText("如果启用，粘贴的复制文件如果有已知名称将被重命名。")

regex.source: .appendText("If disabled, only clipboard image objects (e.g., screenshots) will be renamed.")
regex.target: .appendText("如果禁用，仅剪贴板图像对象（例如，屏幕截图）将被重命名。")

regex.source: .appendText("If enabled, attachments dragged and dropped into the editor will be renamed according to the ")
regex.target: .appendText("如果启用，拖放到编辑器中的附件将根据 ")

regex.source: .appendText(" commands will be renamed according to the ")
.appendText("When you are pasting/dragging a file with the same name as an existing file, this separator will be added to the file name.")
regex.target: .appendText("当你粘贴/拖动一个与现有文件同名的文件时，这个分隔符将被添加到文件名中。")

regex.source: .appendText(", etc, getting the first name available.")
regex.target: .appendText(", 等等，直到获得第一个可用的名称。")
